recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: Two
recommendations.overview: Two people, a man and a woman, wake up naked and with their abdomens attached to each other.

recommendations.title: Counter Investigation
recommendations.overview: A cop investigates whether the man convicted of murdering his daughter is really guilty.

recommendations.title: Jesse Stone: Death in Paradise
recommendations.genres: Drama, Crime, Thriller, Mystery, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Jesse Stone looks into the murder of a teen-age girl whose body is found floating in a local lake, it brings him up against the Boston mob and into the affluent world of a bestselling writer who exploits troubled teens.

recommendations.title: I See You
recommendations.overview: When a 12-year-old boy goes missing at a local park, a detective investigates the case to help the boy's family find answers.

recommendations.title: Caddo Lake
recommendations.overview: When an 8-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes on Caddo Lake, a series of past deaths and disappearances begin to link together, forever altering a broken family’s history.

recommendations.title: Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Ben, a journalist from New York City, travels to West Texas in order to investigate the death of a girl he was hooking up with while recording a murder mystery podcast along the way.

recommendations.title: Photocopier
recommendations.overview: When photos of her at a party cause her to lose a scholarship, a student investigates whether something devastating happened to her that night.

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.

recommendations.title: Mulholland Falls
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Los Angeles, a special crime squad of the LAPD investigates the murder of a young woman.
